info.name: QuickHire API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for QuickHire Backend organized by user roles (Admin, User, Company). Base URL: http://localhost:8082/api/v1

exec: pm.test('Response time is less than 3000ms', function () {

query.description: Search in title, description, company name

formdata.value: I am very interested in this position...

body.raw:

  "title": "Senior Software Engineer",

  "location": "San Francisco, CA",
  "type": "FULL_TIME",

}
